hero.headline: Brokering <gold>Metals & Minerals</gold> from Chile to the World
hero.subtitle: We connect international buyers with trusted Chilean mining producers. Operating under the highest compliance and transparency standards.

commodities.heading: Metals & Minerals We Trade
commodities.subheading: We broker the purchase and sale of Chilean metals and minerals to international buyers under the highest confidentiality standards.

oro.name: Gold
oro.description: Precious metal with high global demand. Chile is one of the world's leading gold producers.

cobre.name: Copper
cobre.description: Chile is the world's largest copper producer. An essential metal for the energy transition.

plata.name: Silver
plata.description: Precious metal with high electrical and thermal conductivity, widely used in industry.

molibdeno.name: Molybdenum
molibdeno.description: Critical metal for the manufacture of high-strength specialty steels.

sal.name: Industrial Salt
sal.description: Chile has extensive salt flats with high-purity salt for industrial and food use.

otros.name: Other Minerals
otros.description: We trade a wide range of minerals based on our clients' specific needs.
uses: Consult our team for commodities not listed

process.heading: How We Work
process.subheading: A structured and confidential process to ensure safe and successful operations.

step1.title: Registration & Verification
step1.description: Register as a buyer or seller. We verify your identity and conduct a full KYC/KYB process to ensure secure operations.

step2.title: Confidentiality Agreement
step2.description: We sign a mutual NDA to protect sensitive commercial information of all parties involved in the operation.

step3.title: Negotiation & Closing
step3.description: We facilitate negotiations, manage all documentation, and guide both parties to a successful close.

cta.heading: Ready to Trade?
cta.subheading: Join our international network of buyers and sellers of Chilean metals and minerals.

buyer.title: For Buyers
buyer.description: Access reliable sources of Chilean metals and minerals with full traceability and documentation.

seller.title: For Sellers
seller.description: Connect your production with qualified international buyers and maximize the value of your minerals.

register.success: Registration received. Our team will contact you shortly.

footer.tagline: Private intermediation of metals and minerals. Connecting Chile with the world.
footer.disclaimer: Brokerage operations are subject to KYC/KYB verification. Price information is for reference only.
